$comment: M_FUN.AI.NAMED — 5 named AI opponent personalities. Each multiplies the per-mode AiProfile weights (src/ai/ai-profiles.ts) at the AiPlayer level. Playable from the NewGameModal opponent picker. Bias parameters in CONFIG, not in code — adding a new opponent = 1 row here + 1 portrait asset.

the-builder.description: Hoards economy + buildings; slow to attack. Beat by rushing before they wall up.

the-raider.description: Pumps military fast; harassment-first. Beat by walling chokes + outlasting.

the-hoarder.description: Maximises resources; rarely commits military. Beat by aggressive raiding.

the-diplomat.description: Balanced playstyle; defends well; capitalises on opponent overextension.

the-mad-king.description: Erratic; spams cheap military; rarely builds defenses. Beat with composition + outlast.
